title: Roasted Chana Trail Mix
description: Savory-sweet jar mix of roasted chana, nuts, and dried fruit. Built for bags, desks, and long travel days.
explanation: Roasted chana (bhuna chana) is one of the cheapest high-protein portable snacks in India. Mixed with a few nuts and raisins, it becomes a balanced trail mix that replaces chips and biscuits.
Make a weekly jar and pre-portion into small boxes so travel and office snacking stays intentional.
instructions: If chana or peanuts are soft, re-crisp them in a dry pan for 2–3 minutes. Cool.
Combine all ingredients in a bowl. Toss with chaat masala, salt, and chilli.
Store in an airtight jar. Shake before portioning.
stepNotes: Cool completely before sealing or moisture softens the mix.
Keep dried fruit moderate so the mix does not become candy.
For strict savory, skip raisins and add more seeds and spices.
Office tip: 1/3 cup portions in reusable boxes.
Airport-friendly if packed in clear small bags without liquids.

variationSections.title: Mix formulas
items: Spicy: curry leaves powder + pepper + amchur.
Premium: almonds, walnuts, and dark chocolate chips (occasional).
